comment: Still one of the most instantly memorable pop-country singles ever.
Sharp songwriting, huge chorus, and a production style that still feels fresh.
The bridge hits every time and the whole track has restless energy.
Clever and self-aware, with a hook that gets stuck in your head quickly.
Bright, polished pop that perfectly matches the album's carefree mood.
Big chorus, uplifting message, and exactly the kind of song built for singing loudly.
A dramatic pop collaboration with a chaotic energy that really works.
The contrast between the verses and chorus gives the track a lot of impact.
